hero.title: Generate Professional Roof Inspection Reports in {minutes}

AI-powered roof inspection platform. Upload photos, get instant analysis, and create detailed PDF reports with Xactimate codes.
Perfect for roofing contractors, insurance adjusters, and property inspectors.
hero.tip: 🎁 First report is on us - Sign up today!

introduce.title: What is RoofCost AI
introduce.label: About
introduce.description: RoofCost AI is an intelligent roof inspection platform that uses AI to analyze roof photos and generate professional reports with Xactimate codes in minutes.

items.title: 12-Step Photo Guide
items.description: Follow our guided 12-step photo capture process to ensure comprehensive roof coverage from all angles.

items.title: AI Vision Analysis
items.description: Our AI analyzes each photo to identify damages, classify issues by severity, and detect potential problems.

items.title: Smart Report Generation
items.description: Generate professional PDF reports with annotated photos, detailed descriptions, and Xactimate codes automatically.

items.title: Review & Customize
items.description: Review AI-generated scope items, edit descriptions, add notes, and approve items before final report generation.

benefits.title: Why Choose RoofCost AI
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: Save time, improve accuracy, and deliver professional reports that impress clients and speed up claims.

items.title: Insane Time Savings
items.description: Complete a full roof inspection report in 5-10 minutes instead of hours. No more manual writing and calculations.

items.title: Xactimate Codes Included
items.description: Every scope item comes with accurate Xactimate codes, making insurance claims and estimates seamless.

items.title: Professional Reports
items.description: Generate detailed PDF reports with annotated photos, professional formatting, and shareable links for clients.

usage.title: How RoofCost AI Works
usage.description: Generate professional roof inspection reports in four simple steps:

items.title: Create Inspection
items.description: Enter property address, select roof type, and start a new inspection task in seconds.

items.title: Capture Photos
items.description: Follow the 12-step guided photo capture to document all roof angles, flashing, and potential issues.

items.title: AI Analysis
items.description: Our AI analyzes photos, identifies damages, classifies issues, and generates scope items automatically.

items.title: Generate Report
items.description: Review and edit scope items, then generate your professional PDF report with Xactimate codes.

features.title: Powerful Features for Roof Inspectors
features.description: Everything you need to conduct professional roof inspections and generate detailed reports.

items.title: 12-Step Guided Photo Capture
items.description: Ensure complete roof coverage with our step-by-step photo guide covering all critical areas.

items.title: AI Damage Detection

items.title: Xactimate Code Integration
items.description: Every scope item includes accurate Xactimate codes for seamless insurance claims.

items.title: Professional PDF Reports
items.description: Generate detailed reports with annotated photos, descriptions, and shareable links.

items.title: Mobile-Friendly Interface
items.description: Capture photos on-site using your phone or tablet with our responsive mobile interface.

items.title: Secure Cloud Storage
items.description: All photos and reports stored securely with easy access and sharing capabilities.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have another question? Contact us at support@roofcost.ai

items.question: How accurate is the AI damage detection?
items.answer: Our AI has been trained on thousands of roof inspections and achieves 95%+ accuracy in detecting common roof damages. However, we always recommend human review of the generated scope items to ensure complete accuracy.

items.question: What types of roofs does RoofCost AI support?
items.answer: RoofCost AI supports all common roof types including asphalt shingle, metal roof, tile roof, flat roof, and more. Our AI is trained to recognize issues across different roofing materials and styles.

items.question: How long does it take to generate a report?
items.answer: After uploading all 12 photos, the AI analysis takes 3-5 minutes. After reviewing and approving the scope items, PDF generation takes less than a minute. Total time is typically 10-15 minutes per inspection.

items.question: Can I edit the AI-generated scope items?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can review each scope item, edit descriptions, add your own notes, delete items, or add new items. The AI is a tool to assist you, not replace your professional judgment.

items.question: What's included in the pricing?
items.answer: Each credit includes one complete roof inspection: 12-step photo guide, AI analysis of all photos, scope item generation, review and editing capabilities, and professional PDF report with Xactimate codes.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes! All photos and inspection data are stored securely on encrypted cloud servers. We comply with GDPR and CCPA privacy regulations. You can delete inspections and photos at any time.
